changes.value:
File: kanban-app/ui/src/App.tsx lines 33-34 — `new URLSearchParams(window.location.search)` is constructed twice to check and then get the same `window` parameter. This is a minor clarity issue.

Suggestion: construct the params once:
```ts
const _params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
const IS_QUICK_CAPTURE = _params.get("window") === "quick-capture";
```

Verification step: confirm the two URLSearchParams constructions are redundant and can be collapsed to one."
NIT: IS_QUICK_CAPTURE parsed twice from URLSearchParams
